## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] test (tests only)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)

## Testing checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Existing tests pass locally
- [ ] Manual validation completed (if applicable)

## Migration-impact checklist

- [ ] No migration impact
- [ ] Database/schema changes included
- [ ] Config/environment variable changes required
- [ ] API contract changes introduced
- [ ] Rollback steps documented (if needed)

## Linked issue

Issue: #<id>
